description: This video explains fundamental analysis, focusing on how investors assess an asset's intrinsic value through economic and financial factors.
topic_summary: Fundamental analysis identifies an asset's intrinsic value by examining economic factors [t=16.64] and financial factors [t=21.04]. It considers macroeconomic [t=24.24] and microeconomic factors [t=32.5] to determine if an investment is undervalued or overvalued [t=39.06].
